programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze, those 1.1m waves will be a closeout party; bring your swim fins.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze, those 1.1m waves will be a closeout party; bring your swim fins.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.1m, with that onshore breeze, it'll either be a closeout circus or a surprisingly okay way to destroy a pair of fins.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 1.1m swell might offer a ride or two before the crosswind turns it to soup.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:

🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
With that wind, and just over a metre, today's waves will offer mild amusement and moderate frustration in equal measure.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.1m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
That 1.1m swell with this wind might produce a ride or two, assuming you enjoy a good chop salad.
🌊 Swell: 1.1m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 6.0km/h W (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 13.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.5m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze, those 1.5m waves will be a bit of a wobble-fest.
🌊 Swell: 1.5m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 7.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 18.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
At 1.4m and cross-shore, it'll be rideable, but expect a fight for position and some chop.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h WNW (CROSS) 💨 Gusts: 17.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
At 1.4m, it'll be rideable at Molhe Leste, assuming the wind doesn't completely ruin it.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 17.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
With that onshore breeze and a meter and a half of swell, it'll be a workout, assuming you can even get out back.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 17.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s ONSHORE
programme.desc:
That 1.4m swell with this wind? You'll be fighting chop more than catching barrels.
🌊 Swell: 1.4m @ 14s 💨 Wind: 9.0km/h WNW (ONSHORE) 💨 Gusts: 17.0km/h 🌊 Wind waves: 0.0m

programme.title: 🌊 1.4m @ 14s CROSS
programme.desc:
